en: Rain and snow in the weather menu – The forecast in detail. Today the weather will be mostly clear, but at times there will be increased cloudiness and it is possible that isolated rains will fall, mainly in the south and east, while in the higher mountains it is possible that sleet or even light snow will fall. de: Kongo: Mindestens 200 Tote bei einem Erdrutsch in der Coltan-Rumbaya-Mine. Mindestens 200 Menschen, darunter 70 Kinder, sind bei einem Erdrutsch in der Coltan-Mine Rubaya im Osten der Demokratischen Republik Kongo ums Leben gekommen
title: Κονγκό: Τουλάχιστον 200 νεκροί από κατολίσθηση στο ορυχείο κολτάν Ρουμπαγιά
description: Τουλάχιστον 200 άνθρωποι, ανάμεσά τους 70 παιδιά, έχασαν τη ζωή τους από κατολίσθηση στο ορυχείο κολτάν Ρουμπαγιά στην ανατολική ΛΔ Κονγκό
en: Congo: At least 200 dead in a landslide at the Coltan Rumbaya mine. At least 200 people, including 70 children, have died in a landslide at the Rubaya coltan mine in eastern DR Congo
la: Congo: Saltem 200 mortui in lapsu meo Coltan Rumbaya. Saltem 200 homines, inclusos 70 liberos, in ruina mei coltani Rubaya in orientali DR Congo mortui sunt.
